phrases.text_local: À quelle heure est la marée haute aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR eh lah mah-RAY OHT oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Tides around Mont Saint-Michel are among Europe's highest — up to 14 metres. The causeway can submerge. Always check the day's tide schedule posted at the entrance.

responses.phonetic: mah-RAY OHT ah kah-TORZ UR TRAHNT
responses.french: Marée haute à quatorze heures trente.

phrases.intent_en: Buy an entrance ticket to the abbey
phrases.text_local: Un billet pour l'abbaye, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: uhn bee-YAY poor lab-BAY-ee seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets are sold at the base of the mount. There is no ticket office inside the abbey itself — purchase before climbing the Grande Rue.

phrases.intent_en: Ask whether an audio guide is available
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a un audioguide disponible, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel ee ah uhn oh-dee-oh-GEED dees-poh-NEEBL seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are available in several languages including English. They are highly recommended given how vast and historically layered the abbey complex is.

responses.phonetic: wee ahn frahn-SAY ay ahn ahn-GLAY
responses.french: Oui, en français et en anglais.

phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le cloître, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh KLWAT-ruh seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Gothic cloister on the abbey's upper level is its most celebrated space — a double row of slender columns surrounding a garden. It dates from the 13th century.

responses.english: At the top, on the last floor.

phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ferme l'abbaye ce soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR FERM lab-BAY-ee suh SWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: Opening hours vary by season. During summer the abbey sometimes stays open late for evening visits with dramatic lighting — ask at the ticket desk for the current schedule.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is permitted inside
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut prendre des photos à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kohn PUH PRAHN-druh day foh-TOH ah lahn-tay-RYUR
phrases.cultural_note: Photography for personal use is generally allowed in most areas of the abbey, but tripods and flash may be restricted in certain chapels. Always check signage at each room.
